name: the-defining-decade
description: Meg Jay's 'The Defining Decade: Why Your Twenties Matter and How to Make the Most of Them Now' — a clinical psychologist's guide to the most consequential decade of adult life. Covers why 80% of life's defining moments happen by 35, the myth of 'thirty is the new twenty,' identity capital, weak ties, the urban tribe, cohabitation, fertility, and the twentysomething brain.
